<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>main-single-file</title>
  <!-- 
    CodeTap
    https://codetap.org
  -->
  <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="https://codetap.org/assets/img/favicon.png">
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="https://codetap.org/assets/img/favicon.png">
</head>

<body>

  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Agile Tech - Enterprise Technology, Small Business Prices | CodeTap</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
      href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Exo+2:wght@100;200;300;400;600;700&family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Alata&family=Roboto+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@300;400&display=swap"
      rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
      @property --border-angle {
        syntax: "<angle>";
        initial-value: 0deg;
        inherits: false;
      }

      @property --angle {
        syntax: "<angle>";
        initial-value: 0deg;
        inherits: false;
      }

      @keyframes caustic-pulse {

        0%,
        100% {
          transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg);
          opacity: 0.4;
        }

        25% {
          transform: scale(1.1) rotate(90deg);
          opacity: 0.6;
        }

        50% {
          transform: scale(0.95) rotate(180deg);
          opacity: 0.5;
        }

        75% {
          transform: scale(1.05) rotate(270deg);
          opacity: 0.7;
        }
      }

      @keyframes quantum-field-flow {

        0%,
        100% {
          transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0) scale3d(1, 1, 1);
          filter: brightness(1) saturate(1);
        }

        33% {
          transform: translate3d(30%, 20%, 0) scale3d(1.05, 1.05, 1);
          filter: brightness(1.1) saturate(1.05);
        }

        66% {
          transform: translate3d(-20%, 40%, 0) scale3d(0.95, 0.95, 1);
          filter: brightness(0.9) saturate(0.95);
        }
      }

      @keyframes fieldHum {

        0%,
        100% {
          opacity: 0.5;
          filter: blur(3px);
        }

        50% {
          opacity: 0.7;
          filter: blur(3.5px);
        }
      }

      @keyframes entrance {
        from {
          opacity: 0;
          transform: translateY(var(--enter-y, 20px)) scale(var(--enter-scale, 1));
          filter: blur(var(--enter-blur, 0));
        }

        to {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
          filter: blur(0);
        }
      }

      @keyframes opacity-pulse {

        0%,
        100% {
          opacity: var(--pulse-min, 0.5);
        }

        50% {
          opacity: var(--pulse-max, 1);
        }
      }

      @keyframes scale-opacity-pulse {

        0%,
        100% {
          opacity: var(--pulse-min, 0.6);
          transform: scale(var(--scale-min, 1));
        }

        50% {
          opacity: var(--pulse-max, 1);
          transform: scale(var(--scale-max, 1.05));
        }
      }

      @keyframes blur-opacity-pulse {

        0%,
        100% {
          opacity: var(--pulse-min, 0.5);
          filter: blur(var(--blur-min, 3px));
        }

        50% {
          opacity: var(--pulse-max, 0.7);
          filter: blur(var(--blur-max, 3.5px));
        }
      }

      @keyframes rotateBezel {
        to {
          --angle: 360deg;
        }
      }

      @keyframes slideIn {
        from {
          opacity: 0;
          transform: translateY(-15px);
        }

        to {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: translateY(0);
        }
      }

      @keyframes spark-fly {
        0% {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1);
        }

        100% {
          opacity: 0;
          transform: translate(var(--dx, 10px), var(--dy, -10px)) scale(0);
        }
      }

      @keyframes accent-bar-flicker {

        0%,
        100% {
          box-shadow: 0 0 4px #00fff5, 0 0 12px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.8),
            0 0 24px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.4), 0 0 48px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.15);
          filter: brightness(1);
        }

        50% {
          box-shadow: 0 0 6px #00fff5, 0 0 16px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.9),
            0 0 32px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.5), 0 0 64px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.2);
          filter: brightness(1.1);
        }
      }

      @keyframes shimmer {
        0% {
          background-position: 0 0, 0 0, 0 0;
        }

        100% {
          background-position: 0 0, 100% 100%, 0 0;
        }
      }

      @keyframes spin {
        to {
          transform: rotate(360deg);
        }
      }

      @keyframes shake {

        0%,
        100% {
          transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0deg);
        }

        25% {
          transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(-0.5deg);
        }

        75% {
          transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0.5deg);
        }
      }

      @keyframes chromatic-glitch {

        0%,
        100% {
          filter: drop-shadow(-2px 0 0 rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.7)) drop-shadow(2px 0 0 rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.7));
        }

        50% {
          filter: drop-shadow(2px 0 0 rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.7)) drop-shadow(-2px 0 0 rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.7));
        }
      }

      @keyframes implodes {
        0% {
          transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.15);
          filter: brightness(1.5);
        }

        50% {
          transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.4);
          filter: brightness(4) hue-rotate(180deg);
        }

        100% {
          transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.001);
          filter: brightness(20);
          opacity: 0;
        }
      }

      @keyframes flash-explode {
        0% {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: scale(0);
        }

        20% {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: scale(1);
        }

        100% {
          opacity: 0;
          transform: scale(1.5);
        }
      }

      @keyframes impact-shake {

        10%,
        90% {
          transform: translate3d(-2px, 0, 0);
        }

        20%,
        80% {
          transform: translate3d(4px, 0, 0);
        }

        30%,
        50%,
        70% {
          transform: translate3d(-6px, 0, 0);
        }

        40%,
        60% {
          transform: translate3d(6px, 0, 0);
        }
      }

      @keyframes divider-pulse {

        0%,
        100% {
          opacity: 0.6;
          filter: blur(4px);
          transform: translateX(-50%) scaleY(0.95);
        }

        50% {
          opacity: 1;
          filter: blur(5px);
          transform: translateX(-50%) scaleY(1.05);
        }
      }

      @keyframes guide-pulse {

        0%,
        100% {
          opacity: 0.4;
          transform: translateY(-50%) scale(0.8);
        }

        50% {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: translateY(-50%) scale(1.2);
        }
      }

      @keyframes icon-activate {
        0% {
          transform: scale(1);
        }

        50% {
          transform: scale(1.15) rotate(5deg);
        }

        100% {
          transform: scale(1.08) rotate(0deg);
        }
      }

      @keyframes value-update {
        0% {
          transform: scale(1);
          color: inherit;
        }

        50% {
          transform: scale(1.15);
          color: #00fff5;
          text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.6);
        }

        100% {
          transform: scale(1);
          color: inherit;
        }
      }

      @keyframes momentum-pulse {

        0%,
        100% {
          opacity: 0.6;
          width: 60px;
        }

        50% {
          opacity: 1;
          width: 80px;
        }
      }

      @keyframes border-sweep {

        0%,
        100% {
          opacity: 0.7;
          transform: scaleX(0.98);
        }

        50% {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: scaleX(1.01);
        }
      }

      @keyframes slow-drift {
        from {
          transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg);
        }

        to {
          transform: translate(50px, 50px) rotate(360deg);
        }
      }

      @keyframes infinite-scroll {
        from {
          transform: translateY(0);
        }

        to {
          transform: translateY(-50%);
        }
      }

      @keyframes glow-breathe {
        0% {
          filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.5)) drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.25));
        }

        100% {
          filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.7)) drop-shadow(0 0 50px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.35));
        }
      }

      :root {
        --texture-anodized: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
        --noise-texture: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
        --font-heading: "Exo 2 Thin", "Manrope", sans-serif;
        --font-body: "Manrope", sans-serif;
        --font-accent: "Alata", "Manrope", sans-serif;
        --font-mono: "Roboto Mono", monospace;
        --space-sm: 0.75rem;
        --space-md: 1rem;
        --space-lg: 1.5rem;
        --space-xl: 2rem;
        --space-2xl: 3rem;
        --space-3xl: 4rem;
        --radius-md: 0.75rem;
        --radius-lg: 1rem;
        --radius-xl: 1.5rem;
        --particle-density: 1;
        --holographic-intensity: 0;
        --border-angle: 0deg;
        --angle: 0deg;
      }

      *,
      *::after,
      *::before {
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        box-sizing: border-box;
        text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
        -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      }

      html {
        scroll-behavior: smooth;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
      }

      body {
        width: 100%;
        min-height: 100vh;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        overflow-x: hidden;
        background-color: #08080a;
        font-family: var(--font-body);
        font-size: 16px;
        line-height: 1.65;
        color: #f0f4f8;
        background: radial-gradient(ellipse 160% 120% at -5% 40%,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025) 0,
            rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.015) 30%,
            rgba(18, 19, 23, 0.9) 60%,
            #08080a 80%),
          radial-gradient(ellipse 140% 160% at 105% 60%,
            rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.06) 0,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 25%,
            rgba(25, 27, 34, 0.7) 60%,
            #08080a 85%),
          linear-gradient(90deg,
            #030307 0,
            #070a10 20%,
            #0b0e16 40%,
            #0f121c 60%,
            #0b0e16 80%,
            #030307 100%);
      }

      body.pre-boot {
        overflow: hidden;
        height: 100vh;
      }

      body:not(.pre-boot) {
        overflow-y: auto;
      }

      .section-header {
        text-align: center;
        margin-bottom: clamp(60px, 10vw, 100px);
        position: relative;
        padding: var(--space-sm);
      }

      .heading-2 {
        font-family: var(--font-heading);
        font-weight: 250;
        font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 4rem);
        letter-spacing: -0.02em;
        margin: 0;
        color: #f0f4f8;
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fff 20%, #718096 100%);
        -webkit-background-clip: text;
        -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        text-align: center;
        text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
      }

      .heading-highlight {
        display: block;
        font-size: 0.4em;
        letter-spacing: 0.4em;
        color: #00fff5;
        margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
        font-family: var(--font-mono);
        text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.3);
      }

      .heading-accent-word {
        color: #ffffff;
        background: none;
        -webkit-text-fill-color: initial;
        background-clip: border-box;
        -webkit-background-clip: border-box;
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.5));
        font-weight: 700;
        display: inline-block;
        position: relative;
      }

      .section-subtitle {
        font-family: var(--font-body);
        font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.25vw, 1.125rem);
        line-height: 1.75;
        font-weight: 400;
        color: #cbd5e1;
        max-width: 580px;
        margin: 0 auto;
        text-align: center;
        border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
        padding-top: 2rem;
        margin-top: 1.5rem;
        background: none;
        box-shadow: none;
        text-shadow: none;
        mask-image: none;
        -webkit-mask-image: none;
      }

      h3 {
        font-family: var(--font-accent);
        font-weight: 500;
        line-height: 1.3;
      }

      .text-body {
        font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.1rem);
        color: #94a3b8;
        max-width: 65ch;
        margin: 0 auto;
      }

      .text-accent {
        color: #00fff5;
        font-weight: 500;
        text-shadow: var(--glow-cyan);
      }

      .accent-glow {
        box-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.9), 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.6),
          0 0 16px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.35), 0 0 32px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.15);
      }

      .accent-glow-strong {
        box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.95), 0 0 16px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.8),
          0 0 32px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.55), 0 0 64px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.28);
      }

      .hero {
        min-height: 100vh;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        padding: 2rem;
        text-align: center;
        position: relative;
        z-index: 1;
      }

      .trust-bar {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: center;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12) 0,
            rgba(18, 19, 23, 0.08) 50%,
            rgba(18, 19, 23, 0.1) 100%);
        backdrop-filter: blur(30px) brightness(1.05);
        border-radius: 1rem;
        border: 0.0001px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01);
        width: 100%;
        max-width: min(650px, 90vw);
        margin: 0 auto -44px;
        padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
        position: relative;
        z-index: 20;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 25px #000, 0 20px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9),
          inset 0 1px 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12),
          inset 0 -1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        opacity: 0;
        animation: entrance 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.19, 1, 0.22, 1) forwards;
        --enter-y: -20px;
        animation-delay: 0.15s;
        background-image: linear-gradient(135deg,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01) 0,
            transparent 50%,
            rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.01) 100%),
          repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,
            transparent 0,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.002) 0.5px,
            transparent 1px,
            transparent 4px);
        will-change: transform, opacity;
      }

      .trust-bar::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: -0.5px;
        left: 1px;
        right: 1px;
        height: 8px;
        background: linear-gradient(to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08),
            transparent);
        border-radius: 3.5rem;
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: 10;
      }

      .trust-bar::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        bottom: -25px;
        left: 10%;
        right: 10%;
        height: 50px;
        background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center,
            rgba(0, 220, 255, 0.12) 0,
            rgba(0, 220, 255, 0.06) 40%,
            transparent 70%);
        filter: blur(25px);
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: -1;
      }

      .trust-item {
        flex: 1;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 0.7rem;
        padding: 0.5rem;
        background: 0 0;
        border: none;
        box-shadow: none;
        border-radius: 0.5rem;
        min-width: auto;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1),
          box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        user-select: none;
      }

      .trust-item:active {
        box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6),
          inset 0 -1px 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.98);
        transition: transform 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0.2, 1);
      }

      .trust-icon {
        width: 36px;
        height: 36px;
        object-fit: contain;
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)) drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.4));
        margin: 0;
      }

      .trust-label {
        font-family: "Alata", sans-serif;
        font-size: 0.75rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
        text-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9), 0 -0.5px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15),
          0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        margin: 0;
      }

      .trust-divider {
        position: relative;
        width: 1.5px;
        height: 25px;
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }

      .divider-blade {
        position: absolute;
        left: 50%;
        top: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        width: 1.5px;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        background: #fff;
        z-index: 2;
        box-shadow: 0 0 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
      }

      .divider-glow {
        position: absolute;
        left: 50%;
        top: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        width: 8px;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        background: linear-gradient(180deg,
            transparent 0%,
            #00fff5 20%,
            #00fff5 80%,
            transparent 100%);
        filter: blur(4px);
        z-index: 1;
        opacity: 0.8;
        animation: divider-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
      }

      .hero-heading {
        position: relative;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 820px;
        padding: 6.5rem 3rem 4rem;
        margin: 0 auto;
        text-align: center;
        z-index: 10;
        background-color: #0f1013;
        border-radius: 24px;
        box-shadow: 0 30px 60px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9), 0 0 0 1px #000,
          inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12),
          inset 0 2px 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06), inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8),
          inset 0 0 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
        transition: opacity 1s ease-out, transform 1s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
        will-change: transform, opacity;
      }

      .hero-heading.visible {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
      }

      .hero-heading.animation-complete {
        will-change: auto;
      }

      .hero-heading::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 20%;
        right: 20%;
        height: 80px;
        background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center top,
            rgba(0, 220, 255, 0.04) 0,
            rgba(0, 220, 255, 0.02) 40%,
            transparent 70%);
        filter: blur(20px);
        pointer-events: none;
        border-radius: 24px 24px 0 0;
      }

      .hero-heading::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 8%;
        right: 8%;
        height: 1px;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            transparent 0,
            transparent 15%,
            rgba(74, 95, 227, 0.3) 25%,
            rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.6) 50%,
            rgba(74, 95, 227, 0.3) 75%,
            transparent 85%,
            transparent 100%);
        box-shadow: 0 0 2px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.4);
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: 10;
      }

      .headline-primary {
        font-family: "Alata", sans-serif;
        font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.4rem);
        font-weight: 600;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.18em;
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        line-height: 1.1;
        color: #ffffff;
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 30%, #94a3b8 100%), var(--noise-texture);
        background-blend-mode: overlay;
        -webkit-background-clip: text;
        -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        background-clip: text;
        text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9), 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8),
          0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6), 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4),
          0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.1);
      }

      .headline-tech {
        font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif;
        font-weight: 600;
        font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5.5vw, 3.5rem);
        letter-spacing: -0.03em;
        line-height: 1.2;
        margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        color: #fff;
        white-space: nowrap;
        text-shadow: 0 0 8px #fff, 0 0 16px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8), 0 0 24px #00fff5,
          0 0 40px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.9), 0 0 60px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.6),
          0 0 90px rgba(0, 200, 240, 0.4), 0 0 140px rgba(0, 150, 220, 0.2),
          0 12px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
        position: relative;
      }

      .headline-secondary-line {
        font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif;
        font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.2rem);
        color: #d4dce6;
        font-weight: 400;
        letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        text-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.12), 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        display: inline-flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 0.4em;
        line-height: 1;
        filter: brightness(1.08);
      }

      .headline-secondary-line strong {
        font-weight: 800;
        color: #fff;
        text-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9),
          0 0 8px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
      }

      .accent-housing {
        bottom: clamp(0.8rem, 2.5vw, 1.2rem);
        right: clamp(0.8rem, 2.5vw, 1.2rem);
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        position: relative;
        vertical-align: middle;
        height: 2em;
        background-color: #050505;
        background: linear-gradient(145deg,
            #2a2d34 0,
            #24262c 15%,
            #1e2026 30%,
            #1a1c21 50%,
            #16181d 70%,
            #12141a 85%,
            #0f1115 100%);
        border-radius: 0.5rem;
        inset: 0;
        padding: 0.6rem;
        margin: 0.2em;
        box-shadow: inset 0 6px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95), inset 0 2px 4px #000,
          inset 0 -1px 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03),
          0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        overflow: visible;
      }

      .accent-housing::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: -2px;
        left: 10%;
        right: 10%;
        height: 50%;
        background: linear-gradient(180deg,
            rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.08) 0%,
            rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.04) 50%,
            transparent 100%);
        border-radius: inherit;
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: -1;
      }

      .accent-housing::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 0,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 1px,
            transparent 1px,
            transparent 2px);
        opacity: 0.3;
        pointer-events: none;
        border-radius: inherit;
      }

      .headline-accent {
        color: #00fff5;
        font-weight: 800;
        font-size: 1.05em;
        text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.8), 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.4);
        position: relative;
        z-index: 2;
        line-height: 1;
        margin-top: 2px;
      }

      .headline-accent::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: -40px -60px;
        background: radial-gradient(ellipse 120% 80% at 50% 50%,
            rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.12) 0,
            rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.06) 30%,
            transparent 60%);
        filter: blur(30px);
        z-index: -1;
        pointer-events: none;
        mix-blend-mode: screen;
      }

      .carousel-wrapper {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 1400px;
        display: flex;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: center;
        margin-bottom: var(--space-lg);
        margin-top: 3rem;
        opacity: 0;
        animation: entrance 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1) forwards;
      }

      .carousel-housing {
        position: relative;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 1400px;
        height: clamp(400px, 85vh, 750px);
        display: flex;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: center;
      }

      .carousel-housing.is-dragging::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        bottom: 20px;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        width: 60px;
        height: 3px;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            transparent 0%,
            rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.6) 50%,
            transparent 100%);
        box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.4);
        border-radius: 2px;
        animation: momentum-pulse 0.6s ease-in-out infinite;
      }

      .housing-frame {
        position: relative;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        background-color: #0b0d10;
        border-radius: 24px;
        box-shadow: 0 50px 100px -20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95), 0 30px 60px -30px #000,
          inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15),
          inset 0 2px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05), inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5),
          inset 0 0 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        padding: 20px;
        box-sizing: border-box;
        overflow: hidden;
        background: var(--noise),
          linear-gradient(135deg,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 40%,
            rgba(212, 165, 116, 0.015) 50%,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 60%),
          linear-gradient(180deg, #16181d 0, #0a0c10 100%);
        background-size: auto, 200% 200%, auto;
        animation: shimmer 15s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
        border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
      }

      .carousel-viewport {
        position: relative;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 40% 30%, #13151a 0, transparent 50%),
          radial-gradient(ellipse at 60% 70%, #0a0b0f 0, transparent 50%),
          radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, #111318 0, #000 120%);
        border-radius: 12px;
        box-shadow: inset 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9),
          0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08), inset 0 1px 0 #000,
          inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        overflow: hidden;
        perspective: 2500px;
        z-index: 1;
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
        border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01);
        touch-action: none;
      }

      .carousel-viewport::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 1px,
            transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 120px 120px;
        mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, #000 30%, transparent 100%);
        -webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center,
            #000 30%,
            transparent 100%);
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: 1;
        opacity: 0.3;
      }

      .ring {
        position: absolute;
        top: 50%;
        left: 50%;
        width: 0;
        height: 0;
        transform-style: preserve-3d;
        z-index: 10;
        cursor: grab;
        user-select: none;
      }

      .ring.dragging {
        cursor: grabbing;
      }

      .service-card {
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        appearance: none;
        border: none;
        padding: 0;
        display: block;
        width: 280px;
        height: 400px;
        transform-style: preserve-3d;
        backface-visibility: hidden;
        will-change: transform;
        border-radius: 16px;
        cursor: pointer;
        opacity: 0;
        touch-action: manipulation;
        transition: filter 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1);
        background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1f232b 0%, #0d0f14 100%);
        border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
        box-shadow:
          inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15),
          inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05),
          0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
      }

      .service-card::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 10%;
        right: 10%;
        height: 1px;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35), transparent);
        box-shadow: 0 1px 5px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      .card-content {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 4px;
        border-radius: 12px;
        overflow: hidden;
        z-index: 2;
        background: #050505;
        box-shadow:
          inset 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95),
          inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
      }

      .card-content::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06) 0%, transparent 60%);
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: 5;
      }

      .card-content::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        background-image: var(--texture-anodized);
        opacity: 0.15;
        mix-blend-mode: overlay;
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: 6;
      }

      .card-image {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        object-fit: cover;
        display: block;
        filter: contrast(1.15) saturate(1.1) brightness(0.85);
        mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, black 60%, transparent 100%);
        -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, black 60%, transparent 100%);
      }

      .card-interface {
        position: absolute;
        bottom: 0;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        height: 35%;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        justify-content: flex-end;
        padding: 24px;
        z-index: 3;
        background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95) 0, rgba(5, 5, 8, 0.85) 40%, rgba(10, 10, 12, 0.6) 70%, transparent 100%);
        -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, #000 0, #000 85%, transparent 100%);
        mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, #000 0, #000 85%, transparent 100%);
      }

      .service-label {
        font-family: "Exo 2", sans-serif;
        font-weight: 300;
        font-size: 1.6rem;
        color: #fff;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: -0.03em;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
        text-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8), 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
        -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
        text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
      }

      .service-subtitle {
        font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
        font-size: 0.75rem;
        color: #00d4e6;
        opacity: 0.85;
        font-weight: 400;
        letter-spacing: 0.08em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
      }

      .service-subtitle::before {
        content: "";
        display: block;
        width: 4px;
        height: 4px;
        background: currentColor;
        border-radius: 50%;
        box-shadow: 0 0 4px currentColor;
      }

      .interaction-guide {
        position: absolute;
        bottom: 32px;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
        padding: 8px 20px;
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
        backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(120%);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(120%);
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        border-radius: 100px;
        z-index: 30;
        pointer-events: none;
        transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4),
          inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      }

      .interaction-guide::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        left: 8px;
        top: 50%;
        transform: translateY(-50%);
        width: 6px;
        height: 6px;
        background: #00fff5;
        border-radius: 50%;
        box-shadow: 0 0 10px #00fff5;
        animation: guide-pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
      }

      .interaction-guide.hidden {
        opacity: 0;
      }

      .guide-text {
        font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace;
        font-size: 0.6rem;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.12em;
        color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
        -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
        -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
        text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        padding-left: 18px;
      }

      .service-card.loading {
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      .card-loading {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: rgba(8, 8, 10, 0.95);
        z-index: 100;
        border-radius: inherit;
      }

      .loading-indicator {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
        border: 3px solid rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.2);
        border-top-color: #00f0ff;
        border-radius: 50%;
        animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
      }

      .hero-cta {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 800px;
        margin: var(--space-xl) auto 0;
        text-align: center;
        position: relative;
        perspective: 1200px;
        padding: 0.1rem;
        border-radius: calc(var(--radius-xl) + 2px);
        background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            transparent 0%,
            rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.6) 15%,
            #00fff5 30%,
            #0ea5e9 50%,
            #4a5fe3 70%,
            rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.6) 85%,
            transparent 100%);
        box-shadow: 0 100px 200px -40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95),
          0 60px 120px -30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9), 0 40px 80px -20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85),
          0 24px 48px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8), 0 12px 24px -6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.75),
          0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9), 0 0 80px -20px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.08),
          inset 0 4px 5px -1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07),
          inset 0 -6px 8px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
      }

      .hero-cta::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        height: 1.75px;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            transparent,
            rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3) 10%,
            rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.7) 30%,
            #0ea5e9 50%,
            rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.7) 70%,
            rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3) 90%,
            transparent);
        z-index: 2;
        animation: border-sweep 4s ease-in-out infinite;
      }

      .hero-cta::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        bottom: 0;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        height: 0.9px;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            transparent,
            rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.7) 30%,
            #0ea5e9 50%,
            rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.7) 70%,
            transparent);
        z-index: 2;
        box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.5);
      }

      .hero-cta-inner {
        background:
          linear-gradient(145deg,
            #101318 0%,
            #0f1216 25%,
            #0d1014 50%,
            #0c0e12 75%,
            #0b0d10 100%),
          radial-gradient(circle at 25% 15%,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) 0%,
            transparent 40%),
          radial-gradient(circle at 75% 85%,
            rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.03) 0%,
            transparent 50%), repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,
            transparent 0px,
            transparent 1px,
            rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.01) 1px,
            rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.01) 2px,
            transparent 2px,
            transparent 4px);
        padding: var(--space-xl);
        border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
        position: relative;
        border: 0.1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95);
        box-shadow:
          inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08),
          inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02),
          0 20px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
      }

      .hero-cta-inner::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        background-image: var(--texture-anodized);
        opacity: 0.3;
        pointer-events: none;
        mix-blend-mode: overlay;
        border-radius: inherit;
      }

      .cta-logo-container {
        position: relative;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        padding: 1.75rem 2.5rem;
        margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
        width: fit-content;
        border-radius: 0.75rem;
        background: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.06'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"),
          repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025) 0,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025) 1px,
            transparent 1px,
            transparent 2px),
          radial-gradient(circle at 32% 28%,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 0%,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 40%,
            transparent 70%),
          repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,
            transparent 0px,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01) 2px,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01) 3px,
            transparent 3px,
            transparent 6px),
          linear-gradient(145deg,
            #2d3138 0%,
            #272a31 12%,
            #23252c 25%,
            #1f2128 40%,
            #1b1d24 55%,
            #171920 70%,
            #14161c 85%,
            #101218 100%);
        background-blend-mode: overlay, overlay, screen, overlay, normal;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8), 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7),
          0 16px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6), 0 0 40px -8px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.08),
          inset 0 8px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.98), inset 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 1),
          inset 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95),
          inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06), 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5),
          0 1px 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85);
        border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
        border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        animation: scale-opacity-pulse 8s ease-in-out infinite;
      }

      .cta-logo-container::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: 3px;
        border-radius: 0.5rem;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 0%,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 25%,
            transparent 40%,
            rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03) 100%);
        pointer-events: none;
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025);
      }

      .cta-logo-container::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: -30px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%,
            rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.12) 0%,
            transparent 40%),
          radial-gradient(circle at 70% 70%,
            rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1) 0%,
            transparent 40%);
        filter: blur(30px);
        opacity: 0.6;
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: -1;
      }

      .cta-logo-container img {
        height: 52px;
        width: auto;
        filter: brightness(0.75) grayscale(1) contrast(1.2) invert(1) drop-shadow(0 1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9)) drop-shadow(0 -0.5px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12));
        opacity: 0.8;
        position: relative;
        z-index: 2;
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
        display: block;
      }

      .logo-depth-frame {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 2px;
        border-radius: 0.65rem;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06) 0%,
            transparent 30%,
            rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.03) 70%,
            transparent 100%);
        border: 0.5px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
        opacity: 0.4;
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: 1;
      }

      .cta-messaging {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-xl);
        position: relative;
        z-index: 2;
      }

      .cta-headline {
        font-family: var(--font-accent);
        font-weight: 700;
        line-height: 1.2;
        font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 4.2vw, 2.2rem);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-lg);
        color: #ffffff;
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 30%, #cbd5e1 100%);
        -webkit-background-clip: text;
        -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        background-clip: text;
        text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9), 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8),
          0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6), 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4),
          0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.1);
      }

      .cta-headline strong {
        font-weight: 800;
      }

      .headline-emphasis {
        font-weight: 700;
        color: #fff;
        position: relative;
        display: inline-block;
        text-shadow: none;
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95)) drop-shadow(0 0 8px hsla(185, 100%, 70%, 1)) drop-shadow(0 0 16px hsla(185, 100%, 70%, 0.8)) drop-shadow(0 0 28px hsla(185, 100%, 65%, 0.5)) drop-shadow(0 0 50px hsla(185, 90%, 60%, 0.25)) drop-shadow(0 0 90px hsla(180, 80%, 55%, 0.12));
        -webkit-text-fill-color: #fff;
        background-clip: initial;
        z-index: 3;
      }

      .cta-details {
        font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.1rem);
        max-width: 600px;
        margin: 0 auto;
        color: #a0aec0;
        text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8), 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5),
          0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        line-height: 1.65;
        letter-spacing: 0.01em;
      }

      .text-accent {
        color: #00fff5;
        font-weight: 600;
        text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.4);
      }

      .cta-actions {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: var(--space-lg);
        margin-top: var(--space-2xl);
      }

      .statistics-section {
        padding: clamp(60px, 10vh, 120px) 20px;
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
      }

      .statistics-section .heading-highlight {
        display: block;
        color: #fff;
        font-size: 0.45em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.3em;
        font-weight: 400;
        margin-bottom: 0.3em;
        text-shadow: 0 0 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 1), 0 0 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95),
          0 0 6px #00fff5, 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 245, 1),
          0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.95), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95);
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 0.2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2));
      }

      .carousel-shell {
        position: relative;
        max-width: 1200px;
        width: 90%;
        margin: 0 auto;
      }

      .carousel-shell .container {
        overflow: hidden;
        border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
        transform-style: preserve-3d;
        perspective: 1200px;
        position: relative;
        padding: 1px;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            transparent 0%,
            rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.6) 15%,
            #00fff5 30%,
            #0ea5e9 50%,
            #4a5fe3 70%,
            rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.6) 85%,
            transparent 100%);
        box-shadow: 0 100px 200px -50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95),
          0 70px 140px -40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.92),
          0 50px 100px -35px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9), 0 35px 70px -28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.87),
          0 24px 48px -20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.84), 0 16px 32px -14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8),
          0 10px 20px -8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.77), 0 6px 12px -4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.75),
          0 0 80px -20px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.06),
          0 0 40px -10px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.04),
          inset 0 2px 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04),
          inset 0 1px 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06),
          inset 0 -2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6), inset 0 -4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
      }

      .carousel-shell .container::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        height: 1.5px;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            transparent 0%,
            rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.6) 15%,
            #00fff5 30%,
            #0ea5e9 50%,
            #4a5fe3 70%,
            rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.6) 85%,
            transparent 100%);
        z-index: 10;
        box-shadow: 0 0 12px #00ffff, 0 0 24px #0ea5e9;
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      .carousel-shell .container::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        bottom: 0;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        height: 1.5px;
        background: transparent;
        z-index: 5;
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      .carousel-shell .slider {
        display: flex;
        width: 400%;
        height: clamp(400px, 50vw, 500px);
        transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1);
        will-change: transform;
        background: radial-gradient(ellipse 100% 80% at 50% 0%,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.015) 0%,
            transparent 40%),
          linear-gradient(170deg,
            rgba(15, 17, 21, 1) 0%,
            rgba(11, 13, 16, 1) 20%,
            rgba(9, 11, 14, 1) 40%,
            rgba(7, 9, 12, 1) 60%,
            rgba(5, 7, 10, 1) 80%,
            rgba(4, 5, 8, 1) 100%);
        border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
        box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.015),
          inset 0 1px 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02),
          inset 0 -3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), inset 0 -1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
      }

      .carousel-shell .slider::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 20px;
        background: linear-gradient(to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) 0%,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 40%,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01) 70%,
            transparent 100%);
        border-radius: var(--radius-xl) var(--radius-xl) 0 0;
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: 1;
      }

      .carousel-shell .box {
        flex: 0 0 25%;
        height: 100%;
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
        align-items: center;
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
        transform-style: preserve-3d;
        padding: var(--space-xl) clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 3.5rem);
        contain: layout paint style;
        opacity: 0.5;
        transform: scale(0.96) translateZ(-10px);
        filter: blur(0.8px) brightness(0.85);
        transition: all 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
      }

      .carousel-shell .box.active-slide {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1) translateZ(0);
        filter: blur(0) brightness(1);
        background: radial-gradient(ellipse 100% 80% at 30% 20%,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.015) 0%,
            transparent 60%),
          url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.02'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"),
          linear-gradient(165deg,
            rgba(11, 13, 16, 0.95) 0%,
            rgba(8, 10, 12, 0.98) 50%,
            rgba(6, 7, 9, 1) 100%);
        background-blend-mode: overlay, overlay, normal;
        box-shadow: inset 0 3px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025),
          inset 0 2px 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03),
          inset 0 1px 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04),
          inset 0 -6px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), inset 0 -3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6),
          inset 0 -1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7), inset 0 0 60px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.012),
          inset 0 0 30px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.018);
        border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01);
        border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
      }

      .carousel-shell .box .bg {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.02) 1px,
            transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.02) 1px, transparent 1px),
          repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,
            transparent 0px,
            transparent 20px,
            rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.01) 20px,
            rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.01) 21px,
            transparent 21px,
            transparent 40px);
        background-size: 40px 40px, 40px 40px, 60px 60px;
        opacity: 0;
        transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
        pointer-events: none;
        mix-blend-mode: overlay;
      }

      .carousel-shell .box.active-slide .bg {
        opacity: 0.3;
      }

      .carousel-shell .details {
        padding: 0 var(--space-3xl);
        z-index: 2;
        grid-column: 1 / span 1;
        grid-row: 1 / -1;
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(30px);
        text-align: center;
        position: relative;
      }

      .carousel-shell .box.active-slide .details {
        animation: entrance 0.8s 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) forwards;
      }

      .carousel-shell .details .stat-value {
        font-family: var(--font-mono);
        font-size: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 5.5rem);
        font-weight: 700;
        color: #ffffff;
        margin-bottom: 1rem;
        line-height: 1;
        letter-spacing: -0.02em;
        text-shadow: 0 0 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 1), 0 0 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95),
          0 0 6px #00fff5, 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 245, 1),
          0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.95), 0 3px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95);
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 0.2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2));
        font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums slashed-zero;
      }

      .carousel-shell .details h1 {
        font-family: var(--font-accent);
        font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.8vw, 2.8rem);
        font-weight: 700;
        margin-bottom: var(--space-md);
        color: #f0f4f8;
        line-height: 1.2;
        text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7), 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4),
          0 0 12px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.08);
      }

      .carousel-shell .details p {
        font-family: var(--font-body);
        font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.4vw, 1.2rem);
        color: #94a3b8;
        line-height: 1.6;
        margin-bottom: var(--space-md);
        max-width: 300px;
        margin-inline: auto;
        text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
      }

      .carousel-shell .details a {
        display: inline-block;
        position: relative;
        padding: 25px 30px;
        color: #00fff5;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        text-decoration: none;
        font-family: var(--font-accent);
        font-weight: 900;
        letter-spacing: 2px;
        font-size: 0.85rem;
        border-radius: 12px;
        background: transparent;
        border: none;
        cursor: pointer;
        text-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(122, 242, 255, 0.5);
        transition: background 0.5s, color 0.5s, box-shadow 0.5s, filter 0.3s,
          transform 0.2s ease-out;
        filter: brightness(1);
      }

      .carousel-shell .details a:hover {
        transform: translateY(-4px);
        box-shadow: 0 0 5px #00fff5, 0 0 25px #00fff5;
        filter: brightness(1.05);
      }

      .carousel-shell .details a:active {
        background: #00fff5;
        color: #0a0b0f;
        text-shadow: 0 0 2px #0a0b0f;
        box-shadow: 0 0 5px #00fff5, 0 0 25px #00fff5, 0 0 50px #00fff5,
          0 0 80px #00fff5;
        filter: brightness(1.2);
        transform: scale(0.98);
        transition-duration: 0.1s;
      }

      .carousel-shell .illustration {
        grid-column: 2 / -1;
        grid-row: 1 / -1;
        justify-self: center;
        align-self: center;
        position: relative;
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.5);
      }

      .carousel-shell .box.active-slide .illustration {
        animation: entrance 0.8s 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) forwards;
      }

      .carousel-shell .bubble {
        width: clamp(160px, 20vw, 280px);
        max-width: 100%;
        height: auto;
        position: relative;
        z-index: 2;
        filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5));
      }

      .carousel-shell .illustration::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: -8px;
        background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center,
            rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.08) 0%,
            rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.04) 40%,
            transparent 80%);
        filter: blur(16px);
        opacity: 0;
        transition: opacity 0.6s ease;
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: -1;
      }

      .carousel-shell .box.active-slide .illustration::before {
        opacity: 1;
      }

      .carousel-shell .box .details {
        --enter-y: 30px;
        --enter-blur: 8px;
        animation: entrance 0.8s 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) forwards;
      }

      .carousel-shell .box .illustration {
        --enter-y: 15px;
        --enter-blur: 8px;
        animation: entrance 0.8s 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) forwards;
      }

      .carousel-shell .trail {
        position: absolute;
        bottom: clamp(1rem, 4vh, 2rem);
        left: 50%;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        width: clamp(55%, 65%, 85%);
        display: grid;
        gap: clamp(0.6rem, 1.2vw, 1.2rem);
        text-align: center;
        font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.5vw, 1.3rem);
        z-index: 10;
        padding: 0 clamp(0.5rem, 1vw, 1rem);
      }

      .carousel-shell .trail div {
        padding: clamp(0.75rem, 2vw, 1rem) clamp(0.5rem, 1.5vw, 0.75rem);
        cursor: pointer;
        opacity: 0.5;
        transition: all 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
        color: #94a3b8;
        position: relative;
        font-family: var(--font-mono);
        font-size: clamp(0.75rem, 1.2vw, 0.95rem);
        font-weight: 600;
        letter-spacing: 0.02em;
        background: linear-gradient(145deg,
            rgba(26, 28, 33, 0.6) 0%,
            rgba(18, 20, 24, 0.7) 50%,
            rgba(14, 16, 19, 0.8) 100%);
        border-radius: 4px;
        border-top: 2px solid rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.08);
        box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8),
          inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9),
          inset 0 -1px 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02), 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
      }

      .carousel-shell .trail div::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: -2px;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        height: 1.5px;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            transparent 0%,
            #00fff5 20%,
            #0ea5e9 50%,
            #4a5fe3 80%,
            transparent 100%);
        border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
        transform: scaleX(0);
        opacity: 0;
        transition: all 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
        box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.6);
      }

      .carousel-shell .trail div.active {
        opacity: 1;
        color: #f0f4f8;
        border-top-color: transparent;
        background: linear-gradient(145deg,
            rgba(30, 32, 38, 0.9) 0%,
            rgba(22, 24, 29, 0.95) 50%,
            rgba(16, 18, 22, 1) 100%);
        box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04),
          inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7), 0 0 12px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.08),
          0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
        text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.3), 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
      }

      .carousel-shell .trail div.active::before {
        transform: scaleX(1);
        opacity: 1;
      }

      .carousel-shell .progress-wrap {
        position: absolute;
        bottom: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 1.5px;
        background: transparent;
        overflow: hidden;
        border-radius: 0 0 var(--radius-xl) var(--radius-xl);
        z-index: 10;
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      .carousel-shell .progress {
        height: 1.5px;
        width: 0;
        transform-origin: 0 50%;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            transparent 0%,
            rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.6) 15%,
            #00fff5 30%,
            #0ea5e9 50%,
            #4a5fe3 70%,
            rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.6) 85%,
            transparent 100%);
        z-index: 100;
        box-shadow: 0 0 12px #00ffff, 0 0 24px #0ea5e9;
        transition: width 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
      }

      .carousel-shell .counter {
        position: absolute;
        bottom: clamp(0.8rem, 2.5vw, 1.2rem);
        right: clamp(0.8rem, 2.5vw, 1.2rem);
        font-size: clamp(0.8rem, 1vw, 1rem);
        font-family: var(--font-accent);
        font-weight: 500;
        color: #94a3b8;
        padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem;
        border-radius: 0.5em;
        background: linear-gradient(145deg,
            #2a2d34 0%,
            #24262c 15%,
            #1e2026 30%,
            #1a1c21 50%,
            #16181d 70%,
            #12141a 85%,
            #0f1115 100%);
        backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        box-shadow: inset 0 6px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95),
          inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 1), inset 0 -1px 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03),
          0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      }

      .calculator-button-wrapper {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: center;
        margin-top: 3rem;
        position: relative;
        z-index: 3;
        perspective: 1000px;
      }

      .quantum-advantage-section {
        padding: clamp(60px, 10vh, 120px) 20px;
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
        isolation: isolate;
      }

      .quantum-advantage-section .heading-highlight {
        display: block;
        color: #94a3b8;
        font-size: 0.45em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.3em;
        font-weight: 400;
        margin-bottom: 0.3em;
        text-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9), 0 0 8px #00fff5,
          0 0 16px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.8), 0 0 28px rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.5),
          0 0 50px rgba(0, 220, 240, 0.25), 0 0 90px rgba(0, 180, 220, 0.12);
      }

      .quantum-terminal-array {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 3.5rem);
        margin-top: var(--space-3xl, 4rem);
        position: relative;
        z-index: 2;
        perspective: 2500px;
      }

      .quantum-terminal-array::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: -50px;
        background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 25% 25%,
            rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.03) 0,
            transparent 40%),
          radial-gradient(ellipse at 75% 75%,
            rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.025) 0,
            transparent 40%),
          radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%,
            rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.02) 0,
            transparent 30%);
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: -1;
        animation: quantum-field-flow 20s linear infinite;
        opacity: 0.6;
      }

      .quantum-terminal-enhanced {
        position: relative;
        border-radius: 28px;
        transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
          box-shadow 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 0.3s ease;
        background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,
            transparent 0,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 1px,
            transparent 2px,
            transparent 3px),
          radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08), transparent 40%),
          linear-gradient(165deg, #121316, #0e0f11);
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        box-shadow: 0 30px 60px -15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7),
          0 15px 30px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6), 0 2px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4),
          0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), inset 0 0.5px 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1),
          inset 0 -0.5px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
        isolation: isolate;
        cursor: pointer;
        min-height: 680px;
        padding: 0;
        overflow: visible;
        transform: translateZ(0);
        will-change: transform, box-shadow;
        transform-style: preserve-3d;
      }

      .quantum-terminal-enhanced::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 1px;
        right: 1px;
        height: 15px;
        background: linear-gradient(to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15),
            transparent);
        border-radius: 28px 28px 0 0;
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: 2;
      }

      .quantum-terminal-enhanced::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        bottom: 0;
        left: 12%;
        right: 12%;
        height: 0.5px;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            transparent,
            rgba(0, 255, 245, 0.25) 50%,
            transparent);
        opacity: 0.6;
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: 2;
      }

      .glow,
      .shine {
        pointer-events: none;
        position: absolute;
        width: 75%;
        aspect-ratio: 1;
        opacity: 1;
        z-index: 1;
      }

      .shine {
        right: -1px;
        top: -1px;
        border-top-right-radius: inherit;
        border-bottom-left-radius: inherit;
        border: 1px solid transparent;
        --start: 12%;
        --end: 50%;
        --hue: 255;
        --conic: -45deg;
        background: conic-gradient(from var(--conic),
            transparent var(--start),
            hsl(var(--hue), 80%, 60%),
            transparent var(--end)) border-box;
        mask: linear-gradient(transparent, transparent), linear-gradient(#000, #000);
        mask-clip: padding-box, border-box;
        mask-composite: subtract;
      }

      .shine::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: -2px;
        border-radius: inherit;
        z-index: 2;
        --start: 17%;
        --end: 33%;
        background: conic-gradient(from var(--conic),
            transparent var(--start),
            hsl(var(--hue), 80%, 85%),
            transparent var(--end));
      }

      .shine-bottom {
        top: auto;
        bottom: -1px;
        left: -1px;
        right: auto;
        --hue: 222;
        --conic: 135deg;
        background: conic-gradient(from var(--conic),
            transparent var(--start),
            hsl(var(--hue), 80%, 60%),
            transparent var(--end)) border-box;
        animation-delay: -2s;
      }

      .glow {
        border-top-right-radius: calc(28px * 2.5);
        border-bottom-left-radius: calc(28px * 2.5);
        border: calc(28px * 1.25) solid transparent;
        top: calc(28px * -2);
        right: calc(28px * -2);
        mix-blend-mode: plus-lighter;
        filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.5) brightness(1);
        --hue: 255;
        --conic: -45deg;
        animation: scale-opacity-pulse 5s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
        --scale-min: 1;
        --scale-max: 1.05;
        --pulse-min: 0.3;
        --pulse-max: 0.6;
      }

      .glow::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        border: inherit;
        border-radius: inherit;
        background: conic-gradient(from var(--conic),
            transparent var(--start, 0),
            hsl(var(--hue), 95%, 60%),
            transparent var(--end, 50%)) border-box;
        mask: linear-gradient(transparent, transparent), linear-gradient(#000, #000);
        mask-repeat: no-repeat;
        mask-clip: padding-box, border-box;
        mask-composite: subtract;
      }

      .glow-bottom {
        top: auto;
        right: auto;
        bottom: calc(28px * -2);
        left: calc(28px * -2);
        --hue: 222;
        --conic: 135deg;
        animation-delay: -2s;
        mix-blend-mode: screen;
      }

      .glow-bottom::after {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;

      .quantum-information-display {

        border-radius: 28px;

      .quantum-terminal-id {

        box-shadow: inset 0 6px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95),
          inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 1), inset 0 -1px 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03),
          0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        font-family: var(--font-mono, "Roboto Mono", monospace);
        font-size: 1.5rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: #718096;
        text-shadow: 0 1px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);

      .terminal-classification {

      .classification-label {

        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.1em;

        background: linear-gradient(90deg, hsl(185, 100%, 90%), hsl(185, 100%, 70%));
        -webkit-background-clip: text;
        background-clip: text;
        color: transparent;
        padding: 0;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 0;

      .system-diagnostics {

      .diagnostic-indicator {

      .diagnostic-label {

      .quantum-data-core {

      .quantum-data-core::after {
        content: "";

        background: linear-gradient(90deg,

      .primary-metric-display {
        text-align: center;
        margin: 2.5rem 0;

        background: 0 0;

        border-radius: 0;

      .metric-visualization-container {

        align-items: center;

      .metric-hologram {

      .metric-primary-value {

        font-weight: 700;
        color: #fff;
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95)) drop-shadow(0 0 8px hsla(185, 100%, 70%, 1)) drop-shadow(0 0 16px hsla(185, 100%, 70%, 0.8)) drop-shadow(0 0 28px hsla(185, 100%, 65%, 0.5)) drop-shadow(0 0 50px hsla(185, 90%, 60%, 0.25)) drop-shadow(0 0 90px hsla(180, 80%, 55%, 0.12));
        text-shadow: none;
      }

      .metric-unit-designation {
        font-family: var(--font-mono, "Roboto Mono", monospace);
        font-size: 3rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: #fff;
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95)) drop-shadow(0 0 8px hsla(185, 100%, 70%, 1)) drop-shadow(0 0 16px hsla(185, 100%, 70%, 0.8)) drop-shadow(0 0 28px hsla(185, 100%, 65%, 0.5)) drop-shadow(0 0 50px hsla(185, 90%, 60%, 0.25)) drop-shadow(0 0 90px hsla(180, 80%, 55%, 0.12));
        align-self: center;
      }

      .information-architecture {
        text-align: center;
        margin: 0 0 2.5rem;
        padding: 0;
        background: 0 0;

        border-radius: 0;

      .quantum-terminal-title {
        font-size: 1.75rem;

        margin-bottom: 0.75rem;

        text-shadow: none;
      }

      .title-emphasis,
      .title-primary {
        color: #fff;
        background: 0 0;
        -webkit-background-clip: unset;
        background-clip: unset;
        filter: none;
